title: Willichia callitrichoides
taxonomy: Willichia callitrichoides is classified within the family Annonaceae. This family consists of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical regions of the world. The genus Willichia is a part of the Annonaceae family and consists of several species of flowering plants. Willichia callitrichoides is native to Central and South America, where it thrives in humid and subtropical environments. Further classification of Willichia callitrichoides may include its order and family within the plant kingdom.
